creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 239287
v1

Moin moin

kde@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update KDE-Qt5 rebased on the 5.15.8 branch.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here:

https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-Qt-Update-Qt-5-to-5.15.8.patch

mfg Tobias
